headline: Is Hershey (HSY) Quietly Redefining Its US Playbook With New Leadership And Protein Snacking?
summary: The Hershey Company recently named longtime PepsiCo executive Heather Hoytink as President, U.S., and earlier launched the ONE x Reese's Peanut Butter Chocolate Layered Protein Bar, which combines Reese’s-inspired flavor with 18g of protein and only 2g of sugar for on-the-go snacking. Together, the leadership change and expansion into higher-protein snacking highlight how Hershey is pairing seasoned commercial expertise with brand-led innovation in salty and better-for-you categories. With...
